responsibilities: Characterize material properties using SEM, XRD, and thermal analysis techniques to support new product development
Design and conduct mechanical testing protocols to evaluate tensile strength, fatigue, and durability of new materials
Investigate field and lab failures through root cause failure analysis to determine fracture mechanisms and material defects
Develop novel polymer and composite formulations to meet performance, cost, and sustainability targets
Collaborate with manufacturing and process engineering teams to scale lab-validated materials into production environments
Author technical reports and present materials characterization findings to cross-functional product development teams
Apply computational modeling and finite element analysis to predict material behavior under varying environmental conditions
Evaluate alternative materials and suppliers to optimize cost, performance, and regulatory compliance across product lines
